feed.title: Google Cloud: Confidential Space
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Confidential Space

entry.content: A Confidential Space image (260400) is available. Support for Confidential Space on H100 GPU (a3-highgpu-1g machine family) is generally available.
entry.summary: A new Confidential Space image (260400) is now available. Support for Confidential Space on the H100 GPU (a3-highgpu-1g machine family) has also reached general availability.
entry.title: Announcement: Confidential Space image now available

entry.content: A Confidential Space image (260400) is available. Support for Confidential Space on H100 GPU (a3-highgpu-1g machine family) is generally available.
entry.summary: A new Confidential Space image (260400) is now available. Support for Confidential Space on the H100 GPU (a3-highgpu-1g machine family) has reached general availability.
entry.title: Announcement: Confidential Space Image Now Available

entry.content: A new Confidential Space image (260300) is available.
entry.summary: A new Confidential Space image (version 260300) has been released. This update brings improvements and new features to the platform.
entry.title: Announcement: New Confidential Space Image Available

entry.summary: New Confidential Space images (260100, 260200) have been released. These updates provide enhanced security and performance for your confidential computing workloads.
entry.title: Announcement: New Confidential Space images available

entry.content: A new Confidential Space image (251200) is available.
entry.summary: A new Confidential Space image (version 251200) has been released. This update provides the latest features and security enhancements for the Confidential Space environment.
entry.title: Announcement: Confidential Space image update

entry.content: New Confidential Space images (251000 and 251001) are now available.
entry.summary: New Confidential Space images have been released.
entry.title: Announcement: Confidential Space Images Updated

entry.content: A new Confidential Space image (250800) is now available.
entry.summary: A new Confidential Space image (250800) has been released.
entry.title: Changed: Confidential Space image updated
